headline: Walmart CEO Shift Puts Valuation And Growth Priorities In Focus
summary: Walmart has appointed John Furner as its new CEO, succeeding Doug McMillon. The leadership change comes as large U.S. companies overhaul executive teams in response to rapid industry shifts. Investors are watching for how the new CEO will approach private-label products, omnichannel growth, and technology use. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WMT, this leadership transition arrives after a strong multi year share performance, with the stock up 37.8% over the past year and 200.1% over five...

headline: Sam’s Club Launches Enhanced Express Delivery, Fueling Continued eCommerce Growth with Checkout to Doorstep Delivery in as Soon as an Hour – Often Less
summary: BENTONVILLE, Ark., April 22, 2026--Sam’s Club, a leading membership retail club, has launched an enhanced tier to its popular Express delivery, enabling members to go from checkout to doorstep delivery on thousands of in-club items in as little as an hour—often faster—with no minimum purchase and at the same price as in the club.

headline: Brightstar Capital Partners Invests in Bendon, a Provider of Screen-Free Children’s Activity Products
summary: NEW YORK & WEST PALM BEACH, Fla., April 22, 2026--Brightstar Capital Partners ("Brightstar"), a private equity firm focused on partnering with entrepreneurs and management teams, today announced its acquisition of Bendon Publishing International, Inc. ("Bendon" or "the Company"), a designer and distributor of licensed children’s coloring, activity, and educational products.
